infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Kalta uses the camera to scan box QR codes and product barcodes, and to take photos of items.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Kalta uses your photo library to attach product images to items.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: Kalta saves item photos to your library.

plugins.cameraPermission: Kalta uses the camera to scan box QR codes, product barcodes, and take item photos.

plugins.photosPermission: Kalta uses your photo library to attach product images to items.
plugins.cameraPermission: Kalta uses the camera to take item photos.

plugins.bluetoothAlwaysUsageDescription: Kalta uses Bluetooth to print QR labels and sync with nearby devices.
plugins.localNetworkUsageDescription: Kalta uses your local network to sync data with nearby devices.
